title: Coin-crab
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|crab}} {{Species |image= |name=Coin-crab |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' |class=[[Crustacean/Legends|Crustacean]] |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Small size |lifespan= |origin=[[Taris/Legends|Taris]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |habitat=Tarisian [[Beach/Legends|coastlines]] |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|What are those?''"
"''Coin-crabs. Reminds me of those happy days we spent frying Yuuzhan Vong.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Goran Beviin]]|}} '''Coin-crabs''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small [[Crustacean/Legends|crustaceans]], [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Beach/Legends|coastlines]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Known to be tasty when eaten, [[deep-fried coin-crabs]] were served at the [[Horizon Hotel]] in Taris' [[Upper City]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the veteran [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] [[Goran Beviin]] ordered a bowl of deep-fried [[Coin/Legends|coin]]-[[Crab/Legends|crabs]] while visiting the Horizon [[Hotel/Legends|Hotel]] for a meeting with [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. ==Behind the scenes== Coin-crabs were first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel [[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines|''Bloodlines'']], written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] and published [[August 29]], [[2006]]. The coin-crab later received a brief informational entry in the [[2008]] reference guide ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which provided new details on the crab's native habitat. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Münzkrabbe |pl=Monetokraby }} [[Category:Coastal creatures]] [[Category:Creatures of Taris]] [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Crustaceans]] [[Category:Food creatures]] [[Category:Non-sentient species]]
